acholi.function_grapher_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Function grapher. Keyboard shortcuts: 1 nio 6 yero kit function, D derivative, A area, T table, L pwony.
acholi.trace_x_position: Ka ma x pe iye me trace
acholi.where_the_function_crosses_the_x_axis_: Kama function kalo i axis x. I point magi, f(x) = 0. Nwoŋo roots pire tek i algebra ki calculus.
acholi.where_the_function_crosses_the_y_axis_: Kama function kalo i axis y. Man aye value pa f(0) — ket keken x = 0.
acholi.the_slope_tells_you_how_steep_the_func: Slope tito boti kit ma function tek kwede i point mo keken. Tangent line gudo curve i point acel keken. Ti ki trace slider me yenyo!
acholi.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Derivative pimo rate pa alokaloka. Yab wek inen kit ma slope loko kwede i function. Kama f′(x) = 0, function tye ki maximum onyo minimum me kabedo.
acholi.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Area ma kicito onyuthe integral — «coko» ducu pa f(x). I kwo me ada, man twero nyutu bor ma kiwoto, teko ma kitiyo, onyo probability.
acholi.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: Ka a > 0, parabola yabbe malo (⏣). Ka a < 0, yabbe piny (⏢). Vertex aye point me lokke. Tem loko 'a' me neno!
acholi.amplitude_a_controls_the_height_freque: Amplitude (a) loyo bor, frequency (b) loyo cycles adi, ki phase shift (c) kobo wave tuŋ acuc/lacuc. Period = 2π/b.
acholi.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: ki tic ki lok ma yot pa nino ducu ki ukungu macek, pe ki lok matek
acholi.for_a_high_school_algebra_or_pre_calc_: pi lakwan me high school i algebra onyo pre-calc, ki lok macalo slope, intercept, vertex, period, ki amplitude
acholi.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Dii «Tit» wek AI tutor otit function man i reading level ma iyero.
acholi.function_zoo_six_common_function_shape: Function zoo — cal pa function abicel ma pol
acholi.sliders_for_amplitude_frequency_phase_: Sliders pi amplitude, frequency, phase. Discrete 5-state classification. Pe score, pe reveal.
acholi.hypothesis_how_does_phase_shift_affect: Hypothesis: Phase shift balo wave ma nen nining?
acholi.find_two_settings_that_produce_visuall: Nwoŋ settings aryo ma cweyo waves ma cal marom i neno.
acholi.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aniaŋ — tit ki lok ni kikomi
acholi.explain_how_each_parameter_shapes_a_si: Tit kit ma parameter acel acel cweyo sine wave kwede.
acholi.design_note_discrete_5_state_marker_no: Design note: discrete 5-state marker; pe wave score; pe reveal — pi design.
